# UC-15.4.2 · APC UPS SNMP Input Voltage Fluctuation and Brownout Detection

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Fault, Performance &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.*

---

## Description

Sustained undervoltage stresses PSUs and drives unnecessary battery cycles.

## Value

Triggers utility tickets before chronic equipment wear.

## Implementation

(1) Normalize nominal voltage per region. (2) Correlate with ATS transfers.

## SPL

```spl
index=power sourcetype="snmp:apc:ups" earliest=-24h
| eval vin=tonumber(coalesce(upsInputVoltage, upsAdvInputLineVoltage, input_voltage_v, ""))
| eval nom=tonumber(coalesce(nominal_input_voltage, "230"))
| eval pct_dev=abs(vin-nom)/nom*100
| where pct_dev>8
| timechart span=5m avg(vin) by ups_name
```

## Visualization

Timechart input V; deviation alert band.

## Known False Positives

Power spikes during equipment power cycling, scheduled load shifting, or DR drills.

## References

- [Schneider Electric — APC product support](https://www.se.com/ww/en/product-category/3100-2000-pdu/)
- [Splunk Connect for SNMP](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/apps#/search=connect%20for%20snmp)
